datum_strategy.scheme: fixture-oriented hinge block datum using the base face and mounting hole row
notes: Use the base block, mounting holes, and hinge-pin holes as drawing QA references only.

tolerance_policy.general: Carry source critical dimensions forward; do not infer additional tolerances.
notes: Project default tolerances remain advisory until real inspection evidence exists.

critical_features.description: Base block communicates the 90 mm by 50 mm by 12 mm machined support footprint.
critical_features.reason: Defines stock size, datum face, and fixture mounting envelope.

critical_features.description: Two hinge ears provide bounded support around the hinge-pin clearance holes.
critical_features.reason: Shows the mechanism-like support feature without claiming assembly motion or load rating.

critical_features.description: Aligned hinge-pin clearance holes pass through the two hinge ears.
critical_features.reason: Controls the hinge pin clearance interface for review.

critical_features.description: Two mounting holes define the base fastening interface.

required_dimensions.label: Hinge pin hole diameter
required_dimensions.reason: Confirms the shared hinge pin clearance diameter.

required_dimensions.label: Base mounting hole diameter
required_dimensions.reason: Confirms the shared base mounting hole diameter.

required_notes.text: Generated quality and drawing artifacts are not inspection evidence.
